tool_args.label: Street space allocation: buses get 33% but carry 79% of people
tool_args.raw_text: Category Buses Other vehicles Street Space 33% 66% People 79% 21%

payload.claim_text: Buses operate on the margins of 42nd St, but carry the majority of the people. Buses: 33% of street space, 79% of people carried. Other vehicles: 66% of street space, 21% of people.
payload.subject: 42nd Street

tool_args.label: M42 running times vary by 20-40 minutes
tool_args.raw_text: Runs can vary by 20-40 minutes, leading to bus bunching, long/unpredictable waits at the bus stop, and crowding on the bus

payload.claim_text: Bus running time is unreliable even within the same time period due to varying traffic conditions day to day. Runs can vary by 20-40 minutes, leading to bus bunching, long/unpredictable waits at the bus stop, and crowding on the bus
payload.subject: M42 bus service on 42nd Street

tool_args.label: Banning turns through midday provides operational and safety improvements
tool_args.raw_text: Banning turns through the midday provides operational and safety improvements along 42 St due to high midday pedestrian volumes

payload.claim_text: Banning turns through the midday provides operational and safety improvements along 42 St due to high midday pedestrian volumes. Estimated 120 hourly would-be right turns are already banned during the peak hours.
